scenarios.notes: Early elite-pressure route should prefer Akabeko over Kunai because immediate frontload is the clearer need.
Low-HP sustain pressure should prefer Burning Blood over more damage.
Act 2 attack-dense deck should prefer Kunai as a longer-fight scaling/defense payoff.

scenarios.source: Installed STS2 v0.106.1 pck localization plus v0.2.16 relic ID diagnostic
scenarios.notes: Early Silent deck with elite pressure should prefer Ring of the Snake as a simple card-access consistency relic.

scenarios.source: Installed STS2 v0.106.1 pck localization plus v0.2.16 relic ID diagnostic
scenarios.notes: Healthy early deck with no urgent sustain pressure may prefer Lead Paperweight's conservative colorless-card quality pickup over Burning Blood.

scenarios.source: Installed STS2 v0.106.1 pck localization plus v0.4.3 treasure relic ID diagnostic
scenarios.notes: Skill-dense early Silent deck with elite pressure should prefer Letter Opener as a conservative AoE/frontload payoff over generic quality or sustain relics.
